---
title: "focusonr"
subtitle: "Notes on R, statistical computing, and applied biostatistics"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
listing:
  contents: "posts/*/*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  feed: true
  page-size: 15
  fields: [title, date, description, categories]
---

::: {.callout-note title="The lab now lives at rgtlab.org"}
The Thomas Lab activities (curriculum, publications,
software, teaching) have moved to
**[rgtlab.org](https://rgtlab.org)**. This site retains the
blog only.
:::

Welcome to **focusonr**, a working blog on R, statistical
computing, and applied biostatistics by Ronald 'Ryy' G.
Thomas. Recent posts below.
